text: The dimly lit hallway and the shadowy, nearly unreadable signage evoke a sense of abandonment and disconnection. Despite the hints of work and research ("R+D"), the environment feels cold and impersonal, almost as if I am trespassing in a world paused in perpetual dusk. My thoughts wander to the nature of progress and the spaces we leave behind—what happens when innovation pauses and silence fills the void?
